info.title: EXMO API
info.description: EXMO cryptocurrency exchange API providing access to market data, trading, wallet management, and account information. Public endpoints are unauthenticated; private endpoints require HMAC-SHA512 signed requests.

tags.name: Public
tags.description: Public market data endpoints (no auth required)

get.description: Calculate required amount for a given order

hmacAuth.name: Sign
hmacAuth.description: HMAC-SHA512 signature of the POST body using your secret key. Also requires Key header with your API key.
